markets.question: Yoon out of custody before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if President of South Korea Yoon Suk Yeol is released from custody by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

If Yoon is released but remains under house arrest, the market will still resolve to "Yes".

If Yoon is released on parole, bond, or any other condition that results in them leaving state custody, the market will resolve to "Yes".

Transporting Yoon to another location of custody (e.g., a different prison, court, or hospital within the correctional system) will not suffice to resolve this market to "Yes".

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from government authorities or corrections departments; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Former South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol remains in custody following his February 2026 life imprisonment sentence for masterminding an insurrection tied to his December 2024 martial law declaration, a conviction upheld amid multiple related trials. Trader consensus at 92.5% "No" reflects the Seoul High Court's April 29 ruling increasing his term to seven years for obstruction of justice and resisting arrest, signaling judicial firmness despite special counsel appeals. Ongoing proceedings, including prosecutors' April push for 30 years in a separate case, diminish near-term release prospects before 2027, barring successful Supreme Court reversals, pardons under President Lee Jae-myung, or health-related interventions—scenarios viewed as improbable given the severity of charges and political context.

markets.question: Will inflation reach more than 5% in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Consumer Price Index (CPI) increased by greater than the listed percent over the 12 month period ending with any month in 2026 according to the monthly Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) reports. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

The resolution source for this market will be the BLS Consumer Price Index reports released for each month of 2026 (https://www.bls.gov/bls/news-release/cpi.htm). Resolution of this market will take place upon release of the aforementioned data.

This market may not resolve to "No" until the December 2026 report is issued. Once the December 2026 report is issued, any revisions to previously released CPI figures will not be counted toward this market's resolution. If the CPI report for December 2026 is not issued by January 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve based on CPI figures which have already been made available by the BLS.

Note: the resolution source for this market will be the official monthly BLS CPI news release which reports inflation over 12 month periods to only one decimal point (e.g. 2.9%). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

The Federal Reserve's March dot plot elevated its median PCE inflation forecast for 2026 to 2.7%, reflecting revised expectations from stronger-than-anticipated price data. Cleveland Fed nowcasts project April CPI at 0.45% month-over-month and Q2 headline inflation at a 5.78% annualized pace. Key catalysts include tomorrow's April CPI release on May 12 and the June 16-17 FOMC meeting, where policy signals could recalibrate rate path probabilities.

markets.question: Golden Knights vs. Ducks: O/U 6.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming NHL game, scheduled for May 10 at 9:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Golden Knights and Ducks combine to score 7 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 7, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods and shootouts. In the event of a shootout, one goal will be added to the winning team's score for the purpose of resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vegas Golden Knights enter Game 1 of the Western Conference Second Round with home-ice advantage at T-Mobile Arena after topping the Pacific Division at 39-26-17 and dispatching Utah in six games, while the Anaheim Ducks ride momentum from a 4-2 upset over Edmonton—their first series win since 2017. Vegas boasts superior playoff experience as 2023 Stanley Cup champions and a lopsided 27-8-3 all-time head-to-head record against Anaheim, though the Ducks swept their three regular-season meetings in tight contests. Ducks captain Radko Gudas remains day-to-day with a lower-body injury after skating separately Saturday, potentially weakening their blue line; no major Golden Knights injuries reported. Both squads enjoyed similar rest, setting up a clash of Vegas' depth versus Anaheim's surging offense that led the playoffs with 26 Round 1 goals.

markets.question: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $40 by end of June?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if, on any trading day, the official CME settlement price for the Active Month (front month) of Crude Oil (CL) futures is equal to or below the listed price by the final trading day of June 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

For CME Crude Oil (CL) futures contracts, the active month is the nearest of the contract months listed. The active month becomes a non-active month effective two business days prior to the spot month expiration. For example; if the spot month expires on a Friday the next listed contract will be considered the Active Month on the Wednesday prior to the spot month expiration.

Only the Active Month's official settlement price published by CME Group will be considered. Intraday trades, highs, lows, bids, offers, midpoint values, or indicative prices do not count.

Note that the settlement price may differ from the last traded price. CME's methodology to determine the settlement price can vary by commodity and contract.

Only days on which CME publishes an official settlement price for the Active Month will be included. Days without settlement prices (weekends, holidays, or market closures) are ignored.

This market will resolve based on the settlement price as it appears on the CME settlement page at the time it is first published for that trading day, regardless of any later corrections or updates.

The resolution source for this market is the CME Group website — specifically, the daily "Settlement" price for the Active Month of Crude Oil (CL) futures.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader sentiment on West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude oil futures hinges on persistent geopolitical risk premiums from Strait of Hormuz tensions and Iran's actions, offsetting OPEC+'s recent 188,000 barrels-per-day output hike for June—the third consecutive increase despite the UAE's cartel exit. WTI spot settled at $95.92 per barrel on May 8, up 1.17% amid volatile trading after a 2% monthly decline, supported by U.S. commercial inventories drawing down 2.3 million barrels to 457.2 million for the week ending May 1. June 2026 futures trade around $94–$98, reflecting balanced supply-demand dynamics amid softening global refining runs. Key catalysts include weekly EIA inventory reports, China demand data, and potential OPEC+ policy shifts, with resolution tied to CME active-month settlement on June's final trading day.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the MD-06 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the MD-06 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Democrat April McClain-Delaney's strong position drives trader consensus favoring the Democratic Party at 87.5% implied probability to win Maryland's 6th Congressional District House seat in November 2026. The district, blending Republican-leaning western Maryland areas with Democratic Montgomery County suburbs, leans D+3 per partisan indexes, where she secured a narrow 2024 victory over Republican Neil Parrott. Recent polls show Delaney leading challenger David Trone 49%-38% ahead of the June 23 Democratic primary, bolstered by her 80% approval amid escalating campaign attacks including a cease-and-desist letter. The Republican primary features only three lesser-known candidates, lacking a standout contender, reinforcing Democratic structural advantages despite the GOP's slim current House majority.

markets.question: Valorant: G2 Esports vs Cloud9 (BO3) - VCT Americas Stage 1 Group Alpha
markets.description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between G2 Esports and Cloud9 in the VCT Americas Stage 1 Group Alpha, initially scheduled for May 9 at 5:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "G2 Esports" if G2 Esports win the match against Cloud9.

This market will resolve to "Cloud9" if Cloud9 win the match against G2 Esports.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://vlr.gg. However, if https://vlr.gg has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: In Group Alpha of VCT Americas Stage 1, G2 Esports sits third at 2-2 with a +19 map differential after sweeping ENVY 2-0 yesterday, bolstering their top-four playoff push, while Cloud9 languishes sixth at 1-3 (-30 differential) following a 1-2 defeat to LOUD on May 4. G2 previously dominated C9 2-0 in Americas Kickoff (13-5 Corrode, 13-6 Bind), powered by leaf's 157 ADR and babybay's aggression from their revamped 2026 roster of valyn (IGL), jawgemo, trent, leaf, and babybay. C9, with Zellsis (IGL), Xeppaa, v1c, OXY, and Jackk, relies on duelist firepower but struggles in the current patch meta favoring coordinated sentinel setups. This BO3 on May 9 could shift elimination risks in the single round-robin group stage.

markets.question: Will Anthropic be acquired before 2027?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if credible reporting confirms that any entity enters into an agreement to acquire the listed company by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Mergers where the listed company is subsumed by another entity will count toward a "Yes" resolution.

An announced agreement between the listed company and an acquiring entity will qualify for a “Yes” resolution, regardless of whether the acquisition is ultimately completed.

The primary resolution source for this market is official information from the listed company and/or its leadership; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: SpaceX's April 2026 agreement granting it an option to acquire AI coding assistant Cursor for $60 billion post-summer IPO has emerged as the dominant catalyst shaping trader sentiment in this multi-company acquisition market, highlighting surging demand for developer tools amid AI model development races. This follows iRobot's January court-supervised sale to Picea Robotics, exemplifying how regulatory blocks on mega-deals like Amazon's prior bid can pivot to alternative buyers. Broader dynamics include FTC scrutiny on talent and tech acquisitions, positioning targets like Perplexity AI, GitLab for dev platforms, Snapchat for social algorithms, and Ubisoft for gaming IP as attractive amid consolidation. Watch SpaceX IPO progress, Q2 earnings, and deal announcements through year-end for resolution triggers.

Melanie Stansbury's reelection bid in safely Democratic NM-01, rated Solid Democratic by Cook Political Report and Inside Elections with a D+7 partisan voting index, underpins trader consensus pricing Democratic Party victory at 90.5%. Stansbury faces no declared Democratic primary challengers ahead of the June 2 contest, while the Republican field features Ndidiamaka Okpareke after others withdrew. markets.question: Will Marco Rubio win the 2028 US Presidential Election?
markets.description:
The 2028 US Presidential Election is scheduled to take place on November 7, 2028.

This market will resolve to the person who wins the 2028 US Presidential Election.

eventMetadata.context_description: Vice President JD Vance holds a slim lead at 18.8% implied probability on Polymarket for the 2028 presidential election winner, closely trailed by California Governor Gavin Newsom at 16.7% and Secretary of State Marco Rubio at 15.2%, capturing trader consensus on their frontrunner status in a wide-open, fragmented field. Recent developments driving this tight clustering include Rubio's viral "Hope for America" video and high-profile Vatican trip sparking 2028 buzz, Vance's Iowa early caucus state visit defending the administration's economic record, and his dominance in the CPAC GOP straw poll, while Newsom maintains steady Democratic positioning. The race remains neck-and-neck due to the early timeline before 2026 midterms, with separation likely from midterm outcomes in battleground states, Trump endorsements, foreign policy results, or scandals shifting party primaries and Electoral College path-to-victory dynamics.

eventMetadata.context_description: Team Liquid PH tops MPL Philippines Season 17 regular season standings at 10-1 with a dominant +15 game differential, fueling trader consensus as heavy favorites in their BO3 rematch against bottom-dwelling TNC Pro Team (2-9, -11 differential). eventMetadata.context_description: In RSL Revival Season 5 Group C, Zerg player SHIN faces Terran veteran Bunny in a pivotal BO3 on May 9 at 19:00 KST, with top two advancing from the four-player round-robin to double-elimination playoffs. SHIN, who qualified via Europe server, enters off a 0-2 loss to Group C rival ByuN on April 27 and a narrow 2-1 win over SortOf, building on his 9th-12th finish in Season 4. Bunny, fresh from a gritty 3-2 lower bracket win over Cham in Ladder Legends Valedictorian Cup on April 26 before falling 1-2 to Cure in GSL Season 1 on April 30, also placed 9th-12th last season. markets.question: Will the Fed’s lower bound reach 0.5% or lower before 2027?
markets.description:
The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal fund range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds rate reaches the specified level at any point by December 31, 2026, 12:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

Emergency rate cuts and hikes outside the regularly scheduled meetings will be considered.

The resolution source for this market is the official website of the Federal Reserve at:
https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the relevant data showing the reached level is published.

The FED interest rates are defined in this market by the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds range. The decisions on the target federal fund range are made by the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) meetings.

This market will resolve to “Yes” if the lower or the upper bound of the target federal funds rate reaches the specified level at any point by December 31, 2026, 12:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No.”

Emergency rate cuts and hikes outside the regularly scheduled meetings will be considered.

The resolution source for this market is the official website of the Federal Reserve at:
https://www.federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/openmarket.htm.

This market may resolve as soon as the relevant data showing the reached level is published.

eventMetadata.context_description: The Federal Reserve held the federal funds target range steady at 3.50%-3.75% following its April 28-29, 2026 meeting, reflecting trader consensus on a "higher-for-longer" policy stance amid resurgent inflation pressures, with March CPI rising 3.3% year-over-year—the highest since May 2024—and April unemployment holding at 4.3% alongside modest 115,000 nonfarm payroll gains. Effective federal funds rate stands at 3.64%, with CME FedWatch Tool implying over 98% probability of no change at the June 16-17 FOMC. Key catalysts ahead include April CPI release on May 12 and June policy deliberations, which could shift market-implied rate paths toward potential 2026-2027 easing if disinflation resumes. Prediction markets aggregate real capital to price these uncertainties, balancing sticky inflation against softening labor signals.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the NY-08 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the NY-08 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

markets.question: Nvidia Data Center Revenue above 50B in Q1?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if Nvidia’s data center revenue for the first fiscal quarter of 2027, as reported in its official company earnings materials, is above the listed amount. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.
The specified metric will be considered as reported in the company’s official earnings materials. Subsequent revisions will not be considered.

If the specified company’s official earnings materials for the specified quarter are released, and the specified metric is not included, this market will resolve to “No”. 
 
If the specified company does not release quarterly earnings materials for the specified quarter by July 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “No”.

If the specified metric is reported as a range rather than a specific number, the midpoint of the range will be used for resolution of this market. 

The resolution source for this market is Nvidia’s official company earnings materials, including press releases, investor presentations, and regulatory filings. If the specified metric is not reported in these materials, recordings or transcripts of the company’s earnings webcast may also be used.

Note: This market will resolve based on the most numerically precise version of the specified metric reported in the company’s official earnings materials. Only the specified metric will be considered; alternate versions that differ in definition or scope from the specified metric will not be considered.

markets.question: Russia x Ukraine diplomatic meeting by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a diplomatic meeting between representatives of Russia and Ukraine by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding Russia-Ukraine relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify. 

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the governments of Russia and Ukraine, and a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Will UBS or any of its underwriting affiliates serve as the lead underwriter in SpaceX’s initial public offering?

markets.question: Will Zelenskyy post 140-159 posts from May 5 to May 12, 2026?

markets.question: Will "Pinocchio" be said on ICEMAN?
markets.description:
Drake is expected to release his new album "ICEMAN" in 2026.

This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed term is mentioned by anyone on the specified transcript for any track on the officially released full "ICEMAN" album. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Officially released means that Iceman is officially available for download or streaming (not including live events) by the resolution date. Any Drake album officially confirmed to be the Iceman project will count, regardless of potential name changes.

Samples or clips of audio where people are speaking or singing which are included in the album will qualify toward this market's resolution so long as it is included in the specified transcript. AI-generated audio will count toward this market's resolution so long as it is included in the specified transcript.

In the case a term is censored on a relevant transcript, audio may be consulted to verify that a qualifying mention occurred.

Misspellings or iterations of the listed term, including all grammatical or slang forms, or misspellings with extra, missing, or incorrect letters (ex: helloooooooo or heoll, for ‘hello’), will not count toward a “Yes” resolution, regardless of context or intent.

Any usage of the term, regardless of context, will count toward the resolution of this market.

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g. joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

If this market requires a specified number of mentions of a person’s first or last name, a full-name mention will count as one mention (e.g., if a market is about “Joe / Biden 5+ times,” a mention of “Joe Biden” will count once).

This market will resolve according to the initial release of the full album on a qualifying streaming platform. Releases consisting only of individual songs or remixes released later will not qualify.

The resolution source for this market will be the audio transcripts for this album provided by the listed streaming platforms in the following order of priority: Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube Music, Amazon Music, Tidal (e.g., Spotify will be used unless it does not provide a necessary transcript, then Apple Music will be used, etc.).

If no such album is released in full by by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to based on what has been released up to that point. If the album is not released on any of the listed platforms by the specified end date, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will Israel Katz be the next Prime Minister of Israel?
markets.description:
Legislative elections are schedule to be held in Israel on October 27, 2026. 

This market will resolve to the next individual who is officially appointed and sworn in as Prime Minister of Israel following the 2026 parliamentary election. If an election is called early, this market will immediately resolve to the individual who is officially appointed and sworn in after that election.

To count for resolution, the individual must be formally sworn in. Any interim or caretaker Prime Minister will not count toward the resolution of this market.

If no such Prime Minister is sworn in by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the Government of Israel; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Recent formation of a joint opposition list by former Prime Ministers Naftali Bennett and Yair Lapid on April 26 has unified anti-Netanyahu voters ahead of the scheduled October 27 Knesset election, driving Bennett's trader-implied probability to a near-tie with the incumbent at 39.5% versus 37.5%. Polls show Bennett's slate gaining momentum with 21 projected seats, while Likud clings to 25 and Gadi Eisenkot's Yashar! rises to 14 amid leadership suitability surveys favoring Bennett and Eisenkot. Israel's proportional representation demands 61 seats for a majority government, amplifying coalition negotiation risks; Eisenkot potentially joining the alliance, security escalations, or haredi draft disputes could decisively separate frontrunners in this closely contested race.

markets.question: US x Iran diplomatic meeting by May 31, 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if there is a diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by the listed date, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify. 

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not count.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

The resolution sources for this market will be official information from the governments of the United States and Iran, and a consensus of credible reporting.

eventMetadata.context_description: US-Iran negotiations have gained momentum with Tehran reviewing a recent US proposal for a one-page memorandum to end hostilities, as reported on May 8 amid a fragile ceasefire in the Strait of Hormuz. High-level face-to-face talks in Islamabad on April 11 marked the first direct US-Iran contact since 1979, featuring Vice President JD Vance, envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner opposite Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. Sporadic naval clashes, including US strikes on Iranian tankers and reprisals, test the truce, while President Trump deems Iran's counteroffer likely unacceptable. Traders eye Tehran's imminent response and potential for renewed in-person diplomacy before ceasefire deadlines.

markets.question: Will Trump and Putin meet next in another EU country?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the location of the next meeting between Donald Trump and Vladimir Putin between September 30 and June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET.

This market will resolve to "No meeting by June 30" if no qualifying meeting occurs during this market's timeframe.

A meeting is defined as any encounter where Putin and Trump are all present and interact with each other in person.

An exchange of words, handshake, direct conversation, or other clear personal interaction between the named individuals will qualify as a meeting. Merely standing in proximity, making eye contact, or being present in the same room or event without direct interaction will not qualify.

For this market, Gulf states are defined as the six members of the Gulf Cooperation Council (Bahrain, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates).

The primary resolution source for this market will be a consensus of credible reporting.

markets.question: Will T1 make a roster change before July?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if any player joins or leaves T1's active League of Legends roster (defined as the active lineup listed on the T1 Liquipedia page: https://liquipedia.net/leagueoflegends/T1) by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

As of market creation the active roster consists of the following players: Doran, Oner, Faker, Peyz, and Keria. Name changes or aliases referring to the same player do not qualify as roster changes.

For the purpose of this market, "roster change" refers to any official signing, transfer, benching to inactive/reserve, release, retirement, or departure of a player from the active lineup. This includes adding new players (transfers, free agent signings, or loans), removing players (to inactive, free agency, or other teams), or any change resulting in a different active roster.

Coach changes and temporary stand-ins for a single match will not count.

The primary resolution source for this market will be Liquipedia; however a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

This system introduces persistent cloud cover, light drizzle, and cooler northerly winds, suppressing solar heating and capping peaks below seasonal norms of ~22°C. Model spreads of ±1–2°C stem from uncertainties in precipitation timing and boundary layer mixing, differentiating outcomes: earlier clearing favors 18–19°C, while prolonged overcast supports 16–17°C. Recent 00Z runs slightly lowered guidance from warmer weekend trends. Upcoming 12Z ECMWF updates will clarify exact thermal profiles before resolution.

markets.question: Will EUR/USD hit 1.35 (High) in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the Investing.com high price (“H”) for any EUR/USD hourly candle for an hour on or before the listed end date (ET) is equal to or above the listed price. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Data for a given candle will be considered finalized once the next candle appears on the specified graph. The last trading day of a given week will be considered finalized once the market closes on that day, typically at 5 PM ET on Friday.

This market will resolve as soon as any finalized EUR/USD hourly candle high price is equal to or above the listed price, or once the final hourly candle in the specified period is finalized. A candle starting at 11:00 PM ET on a given date will be considered to be on that date.

This market’s resolution will be based solely on information from the “H” figure located at the top of the EUR/USD Streaming Chart on Investing.com for the specified currency pair (e.g., https://www.investing.com/currencies/eur-usd-chart).

markets.question: Will the median home value in the DC Metro area be between $566,000 and $572,000 on May 31?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the median home value for all property types in the Washington, D.C. Metro area on May 31, 2026.

If the reported value falls exactly between two brackets, then this market will resolve to the higher range bracket.

The resolution source will be official data from the Parcl Labs Sales Price Index for the Washington, D.C. Metro area (Parcl_ID: 2900475). The settlement price will be calculated by multiplying the published price index value (price per square foot) by 1800 square feet, which is the median home size in the Washington, D.C. Metro area. Parcl is set to publish this data on May 31, 2026. If no data for May 31 is released by June 10, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve according to the most recently published data. markets.question: Games Total: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between PARIVISION and 9z in the PGL Astana Group Stage, initially scheduled for May 9 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Over" if PARIVISION and 9z play 3 or more maps in this series.

If fewer than 3 maps are played, this market will resolve to "Under".

Maps won by forfeit, disqualification, walkover, or default are counted towards the total, provided that the match is completed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all for any reason), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's match forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends due to the clinching map being forfeited this will count as a completed match.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

events.title: Counter-Strike: PARIVISION vs 9z (BO3) - PGL Astana Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike Round 1 match between PARIVISION and 9z in the PGL Astana Group Stage, initially scheduled for May 9 at 10:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "PARIVISION" if PARIVISION win the match against 9z.

This market will resolve to "9z" if 9z win the match against PARIVISION.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://hltv.org. However, if https://hltv.org has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

In cases where a team’s listed name includes minor discrepancies from the resolution source, this market will resolve based on the underlying real-world match rather than exact name matching. Recognizable abbreviations, alternate or erroneous spellings, sponsor tags, affiliate or academy designations, regional identifiers, and minor formatting differences will be treated as referring to the same team, provided the intended team can be clearly and uniquely identified within the relevant competition. If a listed team name has no reasonable connection to any participating team, or if it matches or could reasonably refer to another team in the same competition such that the intended team cannot be unambiguously determined, this market will resolve 50-50.

eventMetadata.context_description: PARIVISION enters PGL Astana 2026 group stage round 1 as the clear trader favorite at #7 in HLTV rankings, buoyed by a 3-4th finish at BLAST Open Rotterdam where they upset Falcons and Spirit, though recent PGL Bucharest yielded a middling 5-8th. South American side 9z, ranked #18, earned their spot via closed qualifier dominance over RED Canids Academy and ODDIK, with added momentum from a FERJEE In House title and 2nd at BetBoom RUSH B Summit, but losses to MOUZ and Spirit highlight tier-1 struggles. No head-to-head history in this BO3 Swiss matchup; key factors include roster stability for both (PARIVISION's Jame-led core vs 9z's dgt-luchov riflers), map vetoes favoring PARIVISION's Ancient strength, and 9z's upset potential in regional meta.

Conversely, the latest guidance from the China Meteorological Administration and sites like AccuWeather projects southerly SSE flow at 10 mph ushering humid air with mostly cloudy conditions, clustering means near 19°C (67°F) but with ensemble outliers pushing toward 22°C under reduced ventilation. New 00Z/12Z model runs expected within 24 hours could sharpen this divide ahead of resolution.

markets.question: Will Movimento Democrático Brasileiro (MDB) win the most seats in the next Brazilian Senate election?
markets.description:

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors the Partido Liberal (PL) to win the most seats in Brazil's October 4, 2026, Senate election, reflecting its dominant position after the early April party affiliation window, where PL gained dozens of federal deputies—primarily from UNIÃO Brasil—and became the largest bloc in both the Chamber (nearly 100 seats) and Senate (16 senators). State-level polls show PL candidates like Carol de Toni and Carlos Bolsonaro leading in key races such as Santa Catarina, while the Senate's April 29 rejection of President Lula's Supreme Court nominee underscores center-right strength. PSB and UNIÃO trail due to regional appeal but lack PL's organizational depth and momentum amid a competitive presidential contest featuring Flávio Bolsonaro. Late scandals or coalition shifts could narrow the gap, though PL's incumbency and candidate quality sustain 82.5% implied probability.

markets.question: Will the next Google Gemini model debut at a score of at least 1500?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the next Gemini model released by Google has at least the specified score on the Arena.AI Leaderboard (arena.ai/leaderboard/text) when the table under the "Leaderboard" tab is checked on the date after the day of the release, 12:00 PM ET.  Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".

Results from the "Score" column under the "Text Arena | Overall" Leaderboard tab at https://lmarena.ai/leaderboard/text with style control off will be used to resolve this market.

If no qualifying score for the specified model is available on the Arena.AI Leaderboard at 12:00 PM ET following the date of the release, this market will resolve based on the first subsequent instance at which such a score becomes available on the leaderboard. If no qualifying score becomes available by the end of the seventh day following the day of the model’s release, or if no qualifying model release occurs by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

If multiple models are released on the same calendar date or if multiple variants of the qualifying model appear on the Arena.AI Leaderboard at the relevant check time (e.g., base, “Pro,” or “Flash”), the highest-scoring variant will be used for resolution.

A qualifying model must be launched and publicly accessible, including via open beta or open rolling waitlist signups. A closed beta or any form of private access will not suffice. The release must be either clearly defined and publicly announced as being accessible to the general public or otherwise made publicly accessible and explicitly labeled within the company’s official website. Labeling errors, placeholder text, or version names displayed on the website that do not correspond to a model that is actually accessible to the general public will not qualify.

The resolution source for this market is the Chatbot Arena LLM Leaderboard found at arena.ai/leaderboard/text. If this resolution source is unavailable at 12:00 PM ET following the date of the release, this market will resolve based on the first subsequent instance at which such a score becomes available on the leaderboard. If it remains unavailable through the end of the seventh day after a qualifying release, it will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Series: Anyone's Legend Kill Handicap (-10.5) vs Weibo Gaming (+10.5)
markets.description:
This market refers to the LoL match between Anyone's Legend and Weibo Gaming in the LPL Group Ascend, scheduled for January 20 at 4:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Anyone's Legend" if Anyone's Legend secures 11 or more kills than Weibo Gaming in the match. 

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Weibo Gaming".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

With double round-robin play under Patch 26.7 favoring aggressive sidelane comps like Jarvan IV and Gnar, AL's roster stability—Flandre top, Shanks mid—contrasts WBG's form slump, heightening stakes for top-4 direct playoff qualification amid tight standings.

markets.question: Decibel FDV above $200M one day after launch?
markets.description:

The token must be actively, publicly transferable and tradable to be considered a launch.

The FDV will be determined using the total token supply multiplied by the token price.

"1 day after launch" is defined as 4:00 PM ET on the calendar day following launch. The resolution source for this market is the most liquid price source available. If Decibel (https://x.com/DecibelTrade) doesn't launch a token by December 31, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, this market will resolve to "No".

markets.question: Will Elon Musk post 880-919 tweets in May 2026?

Replies will NOT count towards the total - however, replies on the main feed such as https://x.com/elonmusk/status/1786073478711353576 will be counted by the tracker.

markets.question: Will the Republican Party win the TX-38 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the TX-38 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

This market will resolve according to the candidate who wins the nomination for the Republican Party to contest the AZ-01 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The Republican primary will take place on August 4, 2026.

If no nominee is announced by November 3, 2026, 11:59PM ET, this market will resolve to "Other".

The resolution source for this market will be a consensus of official Republican sources, including https://www.rnc.org/.

Any replacement of the nominee before election day will not change the resolution of the market.

eventMetadata.context_description: Jay Feely leads trader consensus at 70.5% implied probability in the AZ-01 Republican primary due to President Trump's endorsement and consolidation of support after former AZGOP chair Gina Swoboda's February withdrawal to seek Secretary of State, positioning the former NFL kicker as the establishment frontrunner with strong name recognition and fundraising. Former state Rep. Joseph Chaplik trails at 18.2%, buoyed by his local residency, proven conservative legislative record in LD3, and an April NextGen poll showing him ahead 24%-15% among likely GOP primary voters amid 54% undecideds. A recent PBS debate highlighted Feely's defense of aggressive Iran policy, while grassroots pushback labels him a carpetbagger; the July 21 ballot nears with room for endorsement or polling shifts in this open seat race.

eventMetadata.context_description: Adam Hamilton leads trader consensus at 79.5% implied probability to win the Kansas Democratic U.S. Senate primary on August 4, driven by his April 30 announcement as an independent-minded Democrat and over $1 million raised in the campaign's first week, signaling strong donor support and name recognition from leading the nation's largest United Methodist church. State Sen. Patrick Schmidt holds second at 11.4% after earlier entry in February and prior fundraising lead among Democrats, bolstered by his legislative experience. The crowded field fragments support for others like Sandy Spidel Neumann at 4.9%, with no recent polls but Hamilton's momentum from megachurch profile and funds positioning him as frontrunner ahead of the partisan primary.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chicago be between 58-59°F on May 10?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chicago O'Hare Intl Airport Station in degrees Fahrenheit on 10 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chicago O'Hare Intl Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/us/il/chicago/KORD.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Fahrenheit (eg, 21°F). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices a modest 46.5% implied probability for Chicago's highest temperature reaching 64°F or higher on May 10, reflecting National Weather Service guidance and ensemble forecast models like GFS and ECMWF projecting highs near 62-64°F under partly cloudy skies with light southwest winds. This positioning below the May 10 climatological normal of 68.4°F stems from early May's cool anomaly, with temperatures running nearly 4°F below average as of May 6 amid persistent upper-level troughing over the Midwest. Recent 00z model runs show slight warming from prior cooler signals, elevating mid-60s odds, though uncertainty persists from potential weak frontal timing; watch 12z updates and afternoon soundings for shifts ahead of resolution.

markets.question: Will the Democratic Party win the NY-21 House seat?
markets.description:
This market will resolve according to the party of the candidate who wins the NY-21 congressional district seat in the U.S. House of Representatives in the 2026 midterm elections. The midterm elections will take place on November 4, 2026.

​A candidate's party will be determined by their ballot-listed or otherwise identifiable affiliation with that party at the time all of the 2026 House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources. A candidate without a ballot-listed affiliation to either the Democrat or Republican parties will be considered a member of one of these parties based on the party with which they most recently expressed their intent to caucus at the time all of the House elections are conclusively called by this market's resolution sources.

This market will resolve based on the result of the election as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the United States government, specifically the Federal Election Commission (https://www.fec.gov/).

eventMetadata.context_description: In New York's 21st Congressional District, an R+10 seat where Donald Trump won 60% in 2024, trader consensus favors Republicans at 65% implied probability for the November 3 general election winner, reflecting the district's strong GOP lean despite the open seat after Rep. Elise Stefanik opted against re-election. Recent dueling polls from early May highlight a competitive Republican primary on June 23, with Anthony Constantino (Trump-endorsed, $7.6 million raised) and Robert Smullen (New York GOP-backed, $1.2 million raised) as frontrunners amid ramped-up campaigning. Democrats face a fragmented primary led by well-funded Blake Gendebien ($4.7 million raised), but lack structural advantages; forecasters rate the race Solid Republican with no public general election polling. Primaries will clarify nominees and potential general matchup dynamics.

eventMetadata.context_description: Incumbent Democrat George Latimer's submission of over 9,500 nominating signatures on April 13 secured his unopposed path to the Democratic nomination for New York's 16th congressional district, bypassing the June 23 primary and positioning him strongly for the November 3 general election. The district's D+18 partisan lean, Latimer's 71% victory in 2024, and ratings as Solid Democratic by Cook Political Report and Safe Democratic by Sabato's Crystal Ball underpin trader consensus at 94.5% for Democrats. Republican Joseph Cinquemani advances unopposed but reports no fundraising, reinforcing the lopsided outlook. Realistic challenges include a major Latimer scandal, unprecedented national Republican midterm gains, or legal disruptions, though these remain low-probability in this battleground-resistant seat.

markets.question: Will Steve Witkoff attend the next US x Iran diplomatic meeting?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to "Yes" if the listed individual attends the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran by June 30, 2026, 11:59 PM ET. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

A diplomatic meeting refers to a deliberate meeting between representatives of the listed countries who are acting in an official capacity and are authorized to engage in negotiation or diplomacy regarding US-Iranian relations on behalf of their governments. Meetings conducted indirectly, for example, through designated mediators, facilitators, or interlocutors acting with the knowledge and authorization of the relevant governments, will qualify.

Brief greetings, chance encounters, or talks otherwise not deliberately aimed at diplomacy or negotiation will not qualify as diplomatic meetings.

The meeting must be in-person (including indirect in-person meetings) and must be publicly acknowledged by either government or reported by a consensus of credible media. Remote meetings, phone calls, or other meetings where the relevant parties are not present will not count.

Attendance refers to the listed individual being physically present and actively participating in negotiations at the meeting.

If the next diplomatic meeting between representatives of the United States and Iran takes place over multiple days, attendance at any part of the meeting will qualify.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official information from the listed individual and the governments of the United States and Iran; however, a consensus of credible reporting will also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Amid a fragile ceasefire following U.S. strikes on Iranian tankers in the Strait of Hormuz and mutual accusations of violations, the U.S. awaits Iran's response to a proposed one-page memorandum outlining nuclear curbs, sanctions relief, and de-escalation, with reports indicating possible resumption of indirect talks in Islamabad next week. Secretary of State Marco Rubio has led recent updates from Rome, while prior rounds featured U.S. envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner alongside Vice President JD Vance in April's Islamabad session, facing Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf. Trader sentiment hinges on these precedents and Iran's review pace under new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, with mediation by Pakistan amid heightened diplomatic pressures.

markets.question: Will the price of Solana be less than $40 on May 10?
markets.description:

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other exchanges or trading pairs.

markets.question: Will Partido dos Trabalhadores (PT) win the most seats in the next Brazilian Senate election?
markets.description:
The next federal Senate election is scheduled to take place in Brazil on October 4, 2026, in which two-thirds of the Senate’s 81 seats will be contested.

This market will resolve according to the political party that wins the greatest number of seats in the next Brazilian Senate election. 

Only seats contested in the next Brazilian Senate election will be considered.

If the result of this election isn't known definitively by June 30, 2027, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the result of the election, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by the Brazilian government, specifically the Superior Electoral Court (Tribunal Superior Eleitoral, TSE) (e.g., www.tse.jus.br/eleicoes/resultados-eleicoes).

events.title: Next Brazil Senate Election: Most Seats Won

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus heavily favors the Partido Liberal (PL) to win the most seats in Brazil's October 4, 2026, Senate election, reflecting its dominant position after the early April party affiliation window, where PL gained dozens of federal deputies—primarily from UNIÃO Brasil—and became the largest bloc in both the Chamber (nearly 100 seats) and Senate (16 senators). State-level polls show PL candidates like Carol de Toni and Carlos Bolsonaro leading in key races such as Santa Catarina, while the Senate's April 29 rejection of President Lula's Supreme Court nominee underscores center-right strength. PSB and UNIÃO trail due to regional appeal but lack PL's organizational depth and momentum amid a competitive presidential contest featuring Flávio Bolsonaro. Late scandals or coalition shifts could narrow the gap, though PL's incumbency and candidate quality sustain 82.5% implied probability.

eventMetadata.context_description: Democratic Party candidate Choo Mi-ae dominates trader consensus at 95% implied probability for the June 3 Gyeonggi Province gubernatorial election following her decisive April 7 primary victory over incumbent Gov. Kim Dong-yeon, securing over 50% of party votes without a runoff. Her high name recognition as a six-term lawmaker and former justice minister, combined with active campaigning via the party's "Chu-Chu" committee and recent polls showing a lead over People Power Party nominee Yang Hyang-ja—finalized May 2—bolsters her frontrunner status in this Democratic-leaning province. Reform Party's Cho Eung-cheon adds a third option but trails. Challenges could arise from opposition unity talks, a late scandal, or voter turnout shifts among independents in the final weeks.

markets.question: UEFA Champions League: Unbeaten Champion
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if the 2025-26 UEFA Champions League champion goes unbeaten in every match during the Knockout Stages of the 2025-26 UEFA Champions League competition. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

For the purpose of this market, “unbeaten” is defined as having not recorded a loss during any match in any stage of the Knockout Stages. The “Knockout Stages” include every match starting with the Knockout Play-Offs carrying each round of matches through, and including, the Champions League Final.

If the 2025-26 Champions League competition is cancelled, postponed after June 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, and a team is confirmed as unbeaten through the completed matches prior to cancellation or postponement, this market will resolve to “Yes”. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from UEFA; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus prices an unbeaten UEFA Champions League champion at 99.6% implied probability following the semi-final second legs completed May 6, with Arsenal advancing 2-1 aggregate over Atlético Madrid (1-1 away, 1-0 home) to preserve their perfect tournament record of no losses across 14 matches, including an 8-0-0 league phase atop the standings (+19 GD). PSG progressed 6-5 aggregate past Bayern Munich (5-4 home, 1-1 away) after knockout wins over Chelsea (8-2 agg) and Liverpool (4-0 agg), despite two league phase defeats. Arsenal's defensive mastery and momentum drive the lopsided pricing for the May 30 Budapest final; realistic shifts could stem from key injuries like Saka or Ødegaard for Arsenal, or PSG's prolific attack exploiting set pieces.

markets.question: Will Doja Cat have a #1 song on the Billboard Hot 100 in 2026?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to “Yes” if any song by the listed artist is the number 1 song in any official weekly Billboard Hot 100 songs chart released for a data collection reference period entirely between January 1 and December 31, 2026. Otherwise, this market will resolve to “No”.

Any song released with the listed artist as a primary artist will count, including songs released before 2026. If a song is released jointly by multiple artists credited equally as primary artists, it will count for all of them. Features, writing credits, production credits, or other forms of non-primary contributions to a song will not count. Artist attribution will be determined solely by the artists displayed by Billboard on the relevant chart.

Billboard updates its Hot 100 songs chart each Tuesday (with adjusted release schedules on some holiday weeks), reflecting data collected in the previous week (Friday-Thursday). Each Billboard chart is then titled “Week of (date of the upcoming Saturday)”. The first Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will be the chart titled “Week of January 17, 2026” for a data collection reference period of January 2-8, 2026. The final Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will be the Chart titled “Week of January 9, 2027” for a data collection reference period of December 25-31, 2026.

Updates or revisions made within this market’s timeframe to the #1-ranked song on previously published Billboard Hot 100 charts will be considered; however, such updates will not disqualify a previously published Billboard Hot 100 #1 song from counting. If a Billboard Hot 100 #1 song is revised after initial publication, both the originally published #1 song and the revised #1 song will count for this market. Updates or revisions made after the release of the final Billboard Hot 100 song chart relevant to this market will not be considered.

The resolution source for this market will be the weekly Billboard Hot 100 songs charts published each week at https://www.billboard.com/charts/hot-100/ and through other official Billboard channels.

eventMetadata.context_description: Ella Langley's "Choosin' Texas" reclaimed the Billboard Hot 100 summit for its eighth non-consecutive week on the May 9, 2026 chart, cementing her as the year's dominant force amid massive streaming gains and country-pop crossover radio momentum that sidelined recent challengers. This follows Olivia Rodrigo's "Drop Dead" one-week #1 the prior frame and BTS' "Swim" in early April, bringing the total to eight artists with chart-toppers so far: Langley (first-time winner), Taylor Swift (two #1s), Bruno Mars, Harry Styles, Bad Bunny, Rodrigo, BTS, and Mariah Carey. With half of 2026 elapsed, traders eye upcoming catalysts like Noah Kahan's album-fueled top-10 debuts and Kacey Musgraves' May release for potential breakouts amid intensifying summer competition.

markets.question: Málaga CF vs. Real Sporting de Gijón: O/U 2.5
markets.description:
In the upcoming La Liga 2 game between Málaga CF and Real Sporting de Gijón, scheduled for May 9 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Málaga CF and Real Sporting de Gijón combine to score 3 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 3, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on laliga.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Málaga CF vs. Real Sporting de Gijón - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the La Liga 2 game, scheduled for May 9 at 3:00 PM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Málaga CF, pushing for a LaLiga 2 promotion playoff spot from around fourth place, host mid-table Real Sporting de Gijón at La Rosaleda on May 9 in a late-season encounter with playoff implications for the Boquerones. Recent trader sentiment reflects Málaga's faltering form after back-to-back losses—a 3-2 defeat at Almería on April 19 and a 3-2 home reverse to Castellón on April 25—exposing defensive vulnerabilities amid injuries to centre-back Álex Pastor (knee, out until June) and midfielder Luismi Sánchez (facial fracture). Sporting Gijón, safer in 11th, gained momentum from a 3-0 home win over Cádiz on April 19 but contend with absences like midfielder Mamadou Loum (muscle) and defender Kevin Vázquez (muscle). Málaga hold a strong head-to-head edge (14 wins in 29 meetings) and home advantage, though both sides' recent clean-sheet struggles heighten draw potential.

markets.question: Will Erling Haaland be the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 English Premier League season?
markets.description:
This is a polymarket to predict which player will finish as the top goal scorer in the 2025–26 English Premier League season.

If the listed player finishes as the sole top goal scorer in the 2025-26 EPL season, the market will resolve to "Yes". Otherwise, it will resolve to "No". 

Goals scored in Premier League matches only will count. Goals in other competitions (e.g., FA Cup, Carabao Cup, Champions League, Europa League, international matches) will not count for this market. 

If multiple players tie for the top goal scorer, the market will resolve to the player whose last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2025–26 English Premier League season is canceled or not completed by August 1, 2026, the market will resolve to "Other".

The primary resolution source will be official statistics from the English Premier League. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Erling Haaland's commanding 25-goal tally leads the Premier League Golden Boot race by three over Brentford's Igor Thiago (22 goals), with only 1-2 matches remaining, driving his 96% implied probability as trader consensus reflects Manchester City's chance creation dominance and Haaland's recent form—including three goals in his last three matches—solidifying the gap after Thiago briefly closed to within one earlier in May. Thiago's breakout season keeps faint hopes alive via a multi-goal haul against softer defenses, but Haaland's fitness, City's title push, and superior fixtures make an overtake improbable barring injury or blank sheets from the Norwegian. Other contenders like João Pedro and Viktor Gyökeres trail too far for realistic threats.

markets.question: Will Red Bull Bragantino win on 2026-05-10?
markets.description:
In the upcoming game, scheduled for May 10, 2026
If Red Bull Bragantino wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Santos FC vs. Red Bull Bragantino
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Brazil Série A game, scheduled for Sunday, May 10, 2026 between Santos FC and Red Bull Bragantino.

eventMetadata.context_description: Santos FC holds a slim trader consensus edge at 46% implied probability as hosts at Vila Belmiro against mid-table Red Bull Bragantino (9th, 25%), reflecting home advantage in a closely contested Brasileirão Série A matchup despite Santos languishing in 17th place. Both teams show inconsistent recent form—Santos with draws in their last two (0-0 vs Coritiba, 2-2 vs Bahia) amid a mixed L-W-L-D-D streak, while Bragantino mixes wins and losses (recent L 0-1 to Palmeiras, W away at Mirassol). Frequent head-to-head draws (7 of 15 recent) and mutual injuries—Santos missing Gustavo Henrique and Gabriel Menino, Bragantino without Vanderlan and Fabrício—bolster the 28% draw pricing, with light rain forecast potentially favoring a stalemate.

events.title: Sporting Kansas City vs. Los Angeles Galaxy
events.description: This event is for the upcoming MLS game, scheduled for Wednesday, May 13, 2026 between Sporting Kansas City and Los Angeles Galaxy.

eventMetadata.context_description: LA Galaxy's mounting injury woes, including forward João Klauss out long-term following foot surgery and Erik Thommy sidelined until late May with a thigh issue, have tempered trader consensus despite their superior 10th-place standing in the Western Conference with 12 points from 10 matches. Sporting Kansas City, mired in 15th at 4 points from nine games amid a dismal 1-1-7 record and leaky defense conceding 25 goals, gains a boost from home advantage at Children's Mercy Park and a recent 1-0 upset win at Galaxy's Dignity Health Sports Park on March 14. Mixed recent form—Galaxy's 2-1 home win over Real Salt Lake last weekend versus SKC's heavy defeats like 3-0 at Vancouver—plus balanced head-to-head history keep probabilities tightly bunched around 34% apiece, reflecting a fiercely competitive mid-table Western Conference scrap with draw potential.

events.title: Fluminense FC vs. São Paulo FC
events.description: This event is for the upcoming Brazil Série A game, scheduled for Saturday, May 16, 2026 between Fluminense FC and São Paulo FC.

eventMetadata.context_description: Fluminense holds a slim trader consensus edge at 49% implied probability for the Serie A showdown at Maracanã against fourth-placed São Paulo (44%), with draw pricing at 43.5% signaling high uncertainty in this table-topping battle. Widespread injuries plague both squads, offsetting Fluminense's home advantage and strong recent form (7 wins in 12 matches): key absences include Germán Cano (knee), Lucho Acosta, and Soteldo for the hosts, while visitors miss Lucas Moura, Pablo Maia, Calleri (concussion protocol), and Luciano (overload). Balanced head-to-head history—capped by Fluminense's 6-0 thrashing in November 2025—combined with São Paulo's resilient away resilience keeps the matchup tightly contested amid mutual roster disruptions over the past month.

markets.question: Will the highest temperature in Chongqing be 31°C on May 10?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the temperature range that contains the highest temperature recorded at the Chongqing Jiangbei International Airport Station in degrees Celsius on 10 May '26.

The resolution source for this market will be information from Wunderground, specifically the highest temperature recorded for all times on this day by the Forecast for the Chongqing Jiangbei International Airport Station once information is finalized, available here: https://www.wunderground.com/history/daily/cn/chongqing/ZUCK.

To toggle between Fahrenheit and Celsius, click the gear icon next to the search bar and switch the Temperature setting between °F and °C.

This market can not resolve to "Yes" until all data for this date has been finalized.

The resolution source for this market measures temperatures to whole degrees Celsius (eg, 9°C). Thus, this is the level of precision that will be used when resolving the market.

Any revisions to temperatures recorded after data is finalized for this market's timeframe will not be considered for this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Current meteorological forecasts, including BBC Weather models, project Chongqing's highest temperature on May 10 at around 28°C under sunny intervals and light winds, consistent with early May climatological averages of 26–28°C as the Sichuan Basin transitions toward summer heat. AccuWeather's monthly outlook for May 2026 anticipates daily highs spanning 24–33°C, reflecting topographic heat trapping and variable monsoon influences. Recent days show temperature swings—such as 31°C implied on May 5 and 24°C on May 7 per related markets—highlighting forecast uncertainty from diverging GFS and ECMWF ensembles. China Meteorological Administration updates, due daily, will refine trader consensus ahead of resolution via official station data.

markets.question: Will Roy Barreras win the 2026 Colombian presidential election?
markets.description:
Colombia's presidential elections are scheduled for May 31, 2026, and a second round (if required) on June 21, 2026, in case no candidate secures more than 50% of the valid votes in the first round.

This market will resolve according to the listed candidate that wins this election. 

This market includes any potential second round. If the result of this election isn't known by December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, the market will resolve to "Other".

This market will resolve based on the election results, as indicated by a consensus of credible reporting. If there is ambiguity, this market will resolve based solely on the official results as reported by Colombia's National Civil Registry (Registraduría Nacional del Estado Civil) (https://registraduria.gov.co).

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket prices unidentified moderate Candidate M a narrow 49.5% implied probability to win Colombia's May 31 presidential first-round election, edging leftist Iván Cepeda Castro at 41.5% and right-wing outsider Abelardo de la Espriella at 39.5%, reflecting divergence from recent polls like Invamer (Cepeda 44%) and AtlasIntel (Cepeda 38%) where the Pacto Histórico candidate leads amid eroding support tied to President Petro's low approval and escalating violence from armed groups, including a deadly highway bombing. The fragmented right-wing vote, split between Espriella's security-focused pledge and Paloma Valencia's 20.3% share, sustains tightness; potential separation hinges on upcoming debates, endorsements, voter turnout in swing regions, or scandals in the final three weeks before any runoff.

markets.question: Will Mason Miller win the 2026 NL Cy Young Award?
markets.description:
This market will resolve to the player who wins the 2026 National League Cy Young Award.

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by MLB rules. If multiple winners are announced then this market will resolve to the player whose listed last name comes first alphabetically.

If the 2026 MLB season is cancelled, postponed after December 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, or there is otherwise no winner declared within that timeframe, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The resolution source for this market will be official information from Major League Baseball; however, a consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

eventMetadata.context_description: Paul Skenes tops trader consensus at 36.5% implied probability for the 2026 NL Cy Young as the defending 2025 winner, extending his dominance with MLB's second-best 0.85 WHIP among qualified NL starters, 45 strikeouts (second in NL), and a recent gem on May 7 where he was perfect through 4⅔ innings—headlining MLB's first Cy Young poll on April 29. Yoshinobu Yamamoto (16.5%) and Shohei Ohtani (16.1%) trail closely, buoyed by Yamamoto's 3.09 ERA and 1.01 WHIP alongside Ohtani's league-leading 0.97 ERA over 37 innings in six starts upon his pitching return. Cristopher Sanchez (9.5%) paces NL strikeouts with 60, while Chris Sale (7.5%) sports a 2.31 ERA and 5-1 record through six outings in his Braves renaissance, though traders prioritize Skenes' volume and pedigree amid early-season volatility.
